Public Index

Steven Woods Public Pages

Shared public entry point for long-lived research restorations, active software projects, and supporting reference material. Active project cards below are rendered from the project status manifests in this repository.

Tracked Projects 6
Active projects currently publishing homepage status manifests.

Steven Woods Public Record Project

Deep research archive for Steven Woods' talks, interviews, profiles, awards, and cross-company public record.

Last repo update March 24, 2026
Archive span Public record from University of Saskatchewan through current archive work
Current phase Active research archive
Current focus Public appearances, profile sources, and cross-company media organization

This project is the canonical deep archive for Steven Woods' public-facing biography, media appearances, and cross-company source record.

Open project page

Quack.com Archive Project

Collection of memories, demos, artifacts, press, and recovered code from the Quack.com era.

Last repo update March 24, 2026
Archive span Quack.com era
Current phase Active research archive
Current focus Targeted follow-up on AOL by Phone, investor outcomes, first-party capture gaps, and preserved press

Steven Woods co-founded Quack.com, an early interactive voice assistant company acquired by AOL in 2000.

Open project page

Kinitos / NeoEdge Networks Archive

Deep archive for the Kinitos origin story and the later NeoEdge Networks era, covering documents, demos, artifacts, and recovered code.

Last repo update March 24, 2026
Archive span Kinitos founding through NeoEdge acquisition era
Current phase Active research archive
Current focus Blue Noodle wind-down, investor trail, MostFun, Double Fusion asset-path, and archived site-capture research

Steven Woods co-founded Kinitos in 2002 after AOL and later co-founded NeoEdge Networks; this archive is the canonical deep history for that company line.

Open project page

This homepage is rendered centrally from `data/projects/*.json` so independent project syncs do not write directly into `index.html`.

Recovered Legacy Archives

Old Research Archive Recovery

Recovered entry point for the historical Spectra research site, including preserved publication, course, bibliography, reserve, and raw research-artifact archives.

Last update March 22, 2026
Last addition Research Artifacts Archive

Project Note

The shared public-site style guide lives here for the active project pages, but it stays intentionally low-profile on the homepage. LinkedIn is also linked here as an external profile/source reference.
